title: Aptym's PvP-Tweaks
description: A PvP Modpack, To Make You Good In CPVP/SPVP!
body:
# A Basic Modpack To Make You Better At PvP/Combat!

**Includes Alot Of PvP Mods, As BetterHurtCam, Marlow's Crystal Optimizer And More.
Sodium And More Optimization Mods Are included, so you can play on Low End PC/Laptop.
Only Made For Fabric, In The Future Will Be Also Out For Neoforge/Forge. Includes Some R-Packs In The Modpack. Only For 1.21.1, But Will Be Ported to 1.20.x Soon Too!**

### **_Enjoy :)_**
